title: Forgotten One gains modifier from SPD over twelve

card.rawText: Add +1 to this creature's Modifier for each point in this card's SPD stat over 12.

effect.value: Modifier +1 for each point of SPD over 12

plan.title: Forgotten One gains modifier from SPD over twelve
plan.summary: Put Forgotten One on field with Common Boots raising SPD to 15 and verify its modifier becomes +3.

notes: Pre-place Common Boots on field equipped to Forgotten One so its current SPD is 15.

steps: Set Forgotten One as player_1 primary creature.
Equip Common Boots to raise Forgotten One's SPD over 12.

expectedAssertions.label: Modifier gained three from SPD over twelve

manualVerification: Confirm the bonus dynamically recalculates if Forgotten One's SPD changes.
riskNotes: Uses Common Boots as a deterministic SPD source.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
